place: Choeng Mon, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Sleek White Futuristic Hillside Villa, Choeng Mon
blurb: A luminous white architectural statement cascading down three floors of a lush Choeng Mon hillside — retro-futuristic interiors with surrealist gilded figures, 180-degree ocean panoramas, an 18-metre infinity pool, a private cinema, gym, sauna and spa.
detail:
Gazing over the clear blue ocean, this sleek white villa cascades over three floors down a lush Samui elevation, creating an irresistibly stylish, soothing ambiance with a few whimsical surprises — check the gilded characters scaling the living-room walls. Built in 2023 across 1,450 m², it is a sublime study in modern aesthetics, where retro-futuristic elements meet natural materials and surrealist modern art, and 180-degree ocean panoramas follow you at every turn.

The living room centres on a circular sofa that reads futuristic and retro-chic at once, opening fully to the poolside deck or sealing behind glass; the adjoining dining area seats ten beside an open kitchen with wine fridge and barbecue. The 18-metre infinity pool seems to blend straight into the sea, ringed by beige sun beds and parasols worthy of any beach club. A private cinema with PlayStation, a media room, a gym/games room with table tennis, and a spa with massage bed, sauna and steam room round out the indulgences.

Four light-filled en-suite bedrooms are split across the three floors, each with full-wall glazing onto the ocean, king beds and ensuite bathrooms — the top-floor suite connecting to a study. Fully staffed with a villa manager, private chef, butlers, housekeepers and security, with daily breakfast, welcome drinks and return airport transfers, minutes from Choeng Mon's beach and the five-star resorts of the north-east cape.

features.l: 18 m infinity pool over the sea
